1.content:
# International Personnal Finance | Repayment Management Dashboard

Real-time KPI monitoring...

2.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter exists(geo.location.latitude) and exists(geo.location.longitude) | summarize total = count() by geo.location.latitude, geo.location.longitude

4.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize total_repayments = sum(additionalfields.repayment_amount)

5.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize repayment_success_rate = sum(additionalfields.successful_repayment) / sum(additionalfields.repayment_attempt) * 100

6.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize delinquency_rate = sum(additionalfields.delinquent_repayment) / sum(additionalfields.repayment_attempt) * 100

7.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize avg_repayment_time = avg(additionalfields.repayment_processing_time)

8.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize active_customers = countDistinct(additionalfields.customer_id)

10.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | makeTimeseries total_revenue = sum(additionalfields.repayment_amount + additionalfields.fee_amount), bins: 20

11.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType    | makeTimeseries by:{additionalfields.product} total_revenue = sum(additionalfields.repayment_amount + additionalfields.fee_amount), bins: 20

12.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize by:{additionalfields.product} product_share = sum(additionalfields.repayment_amount)

13.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize by:{additionalfields.fee_type} total_fees = sum(additionalfields.fee_amount)

15.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | makeTimeseries repayment_success = sum(additionalfields.successful_repayment), bins: 20

16.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | makeTimeseries by:{additionalfields.channel} repayment_attempts = sum(additionalfields.repayment_attempt), bins: 20

17.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize by:{additionalfields.repayment_method} total = count()

18.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize by:{additionalfields.region} repayment_failures = sum(additionalfields.failed_repayment)

20.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | makeTimeseries avg_processing_time = avg(additionalfields.repayment_processing_time), bins: 20

21.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | makeTimeseries by:{additionalfields.customer_segment} nps_score = avg(additionalfields.nps_score), bins: 20

22.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize by:{additionalfields.channel} csat_score = avg(additionalfields.csat_score)

23.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize by:{additionalfields.reason} failed_rep = sum(additionalfields.failed_repayment)

25.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | makeTimeseries suspicious_activity = sum(additionalfields.suspicious_flag), bins: 20

26.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | makeTimeseries by:{additionalfields.region} compliance_incidents = sum(additionalfields.compliance_incident), bins: 20

27.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize by:{additionalfields.compliance_type} total = count()

28.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | summarize by:{additionalfields.risk_category} total = count()

29.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType     | sort timestamp desc | limit 20 | fields timestamp, additionalfields.region, additionalfields.product, additionalfields.channel, additionalfields.repayment_amount, additionalfields.customer_id, additionalfields.successful_repayment, additionalfields.failed_repayment, additionalfields.delinquent_repayment, additionalfields.repayment_processing_time

variables.name: Region
variables.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.provider == "internationalpersonnalfinance.event.provider" | dedup additionalfields.region | fields additionalfields.region

variables.name: Product
variables.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.provider == "internationalpersonnalfinance.event.provider" | dedup additionalfields.product | fields additionalfields.product

variables.name: Channel
variables.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.provider == "internationalpersonnalfinance.event.provider" | dedup additionalfields.channel | fields additionalfields.channel

variables.name: CustomerSegment
variables.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.provider == "internationalpersonnalfinance.event.provider" | dedup additionalfields.customer_segment | fields additionalfields.customer_segment

variables.name: Journey Type
variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | fields json.journeyType | filter isNotNull(json.journeyType)| dedup json.journeyType
